commit.message:
feat: add test receipt generator to payments page

Admin can now generate a test Reglo PDF receipt from the payments section
without needing a real Stripe payment, to verify the receipt looks correct
before going live.

- AutoscuolePaymentsPage: "Prova ricevuta" button + modal with student
  selector, amount input, lesson type selector; shows result with "Apri
  ricevuta PDF" link after generation
- autoscuole.actions: getAutoscuolaStudentsList() for the modal dropdown;
  generateTestPaymentReceipt() creates a test appointment + payment record
  so the student also sees the receipt in their mobile app

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix SBR event merging: use canonical_event_id instead of md5 hash

SBR events were not merging with other sources because they used opaque
md5 hash IDs (e.g. bf46cae5524ae5f6) instead of the colon-delimited
canonical format (e.g. basketball_nba:team1:team2:2026-03-10) that the
composite merge logic depends on. This caused every game to appear
twice — once with SBR books and once with all other books.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat(tracking): sistema dopaminante — push al constructor en eventos clave + tracking pixels emails

PUSH NOTIFICATIONS AL CONSTRUCTOR:
- mapa_registered: notifica cuando un prospecto se registra con su enlace
- vio_pagina_gracias: notifica cuando el prospecto llega a la página de confirmación
- vio_catalogo: notifica cuando alguien ve el catálogo de productos

TRACKING PIXELS (10 emails):
- Soap Opera: Email1-Backstory, Email2-Wall, Email3-Epiphany, Email4-HiddenPlan, Email5-Urgency
- Reto 5 Días: Dia1-Diagnostico, Dia2-Vehiculos, Dia3-Modelo, Dia4-Estigma, Dia5-Invitacion
- Pixel 1x1 GIF transparente en cada email → llama a /api/email-open
- /api/email-open: decodifica email → busca constructor en device_info → envía push

CORRECCIONES:
- /api/funnel: eventos de página (vio_pagina_gracias, vio_catalogo) ya no requieren email
- Formulario mapa-de-salida y TrackingGracias ahora envían constructor_ref desde localStorage

commit.message:
Feat/tui browse (#1266)

* Add interactive TUI browser command using Bubbletea v2

Adds `awesome-docker browse` to interactively explore the curated list
in a terminal UI with a category tree (left panel) and detailed resource
view (right panel). Enriches health_cache.yaml with category and
description fields so the cache is self-contained for the TUI.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add TUI pagination, scrolloff, and fix visual overflow

Add pagination keybindings (Ctrl+D/PgDn, Ctrl+U/PgUp, g/Home, G/End)
to both tree and list panels. Implement scrolloff (4 lines) to keep
context visible around the cursor. Fix list panel overflow caused by
Unicode characters (★, ⑂) rendering wider than lipgloss measures,
which pushed the footer off-screen. Improve selection highlight
visibility with background colors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
ci: Pin Xcode version to 16.2 for reproducible iOS snapshots (#965)

* ci: Pin Xcode version to 16.2 for reproducible iOS snapshots

Pin xcode-version from latest-stable to 16.2 in all iOS CI jobs
(validation_ios_ui, build_ios_compose, build_ios_native, ios-snapshots)
to ensure snapshot references generated on CI match local dev.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(ci): Pin Xcode to 26.3 (matches latest-stable on macos-latest)

Xcode 16.2 failed because iOS 18.2 simulator runtime is not installed
on macos-latest runners. latest-stable resolves to Xcode 26.3, which
has matching iOS 26.2 simulator runtimes.

commit.message:
Make global host install primary, ddev container optional

ddev containers often have outdated Node/npm versions, so Playwright
is always installed globally on the host first. MCP servers run from
the host install via npx. The ddev container setup (Dockerfile, config,
cert trust) is now an optional Phase 2 for in-container testing.

Restructured into three phases:
- Phase 1 (always): global install + MCP config
- Phase 2 (optional, ddev): container setup with cert trust
- Phase 3 (optional): test framework scaffolding

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Rebuild site with Astro — Trevor-style minimalist design

- Replace old HTML/CSS site with Astro framework
- Research index page: papers as rows with grayscale hover thumbnails
- Paper detail pages: sticky text panel + scrollable media column
- About page: two-column bio layout
- Remove photography, projects, and old static pages
- Add all papers with co-located media (images + videos)
- GitHub Actions deploy workflow for GitHub Pages

Papers added: DSD (CVPR 2025), BAgger (CVPR 2026), Latent Forcing,
ZeroNVS (CVPR 2024), LP3D (SIGGRAPH 2023), Diffusion STAR survey,
GeNVS (ICCV 2023), NFD (CVPR 2023), DiffDreamer (ICCV 2023),
GNARF (NeurIPS 2022), EG3D (CVPR 2022), pi-GAN (CVPR 2021),
ACORN (SIGGRAPH 2021), MetaSDF (NeurIPS 2020)

feat: add figure lightbox and auto-wrap images in Figure components

Click any figure image to enlarge in a smooth viewport overlay with
caption, close via X/backdrop/Escape. Image transforms now emit
<Figure> JSX instead of raw markdown, with caption support via
![alt](src "caption") and ![[file|caption]] syntax. Shared escapeAttr
prevents XSS in interpolated attributes.

commit.message:
Reviewer polish: taller previews, Skip button; add sprint-2.md plan

scripts/build-reviewer.js:
- Screenshots area fixed at 70vh (flex: none; height: 70vh) so images
  always get 70% of viewport height regardless of other UI chrome
- min-height: 0 on panel and img-wrap to fix flexbox height propagation
- panel-label flex-shrink: 0 so it never gets squeezed

- Skip = advance to next in sequence without recording a verdict
- Keyboard: S to skip

commit.message:
Auto-install mkcert CA into Playwright browser trust stores

ddev uses mkcert for local HTTPS but Playwright browsers have their
own certificate stores. This adds automatic CA installation:

- Dockerfile: add libnss3-tools and ca-certificates packages
- Post-start hook: install mkcert CA into system trust store (WebKit)
  and NSS shared database (Chromium) with idempotency marker
- Mode B MCP: add --ignore-https-errors to all browsers (fallback)
- playwright.config.ts: add ignoreHTTPSErrors: true for test framework
- Replace manual Step 4e with docs explaining the automatic approach

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- Commitar package-lock.json para resolver dependências workspace na Vercel

  para resolução determinística de workspace

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add 3 new scenarios and internet outage simulation

- RemoteStart (idx 3): server-initiated charging via RemoteStartTransaction
- RemoteStop (idx 5): server-initiated stop via RemoteStopTransaction
- Unplug (idx 6): EVDisconnected stop without explicit user action
- Internet toggle button: shows broken lines, offline SVG indicator, greys out backend
- All req/res/push/err functions are now offline-aware: packets queue at network boundary when offline, full callback chain pauses, resumes on reconnect
- Scenarios refactored from independent sched() timers to callback chains so downstream steps only fire after upstream packets actually arrive

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: use int page keys for alt_texts lookup (was str, never matched)

Gemini returns alt_texts keyed by integer page numbers but we were
looking them up with str(page), so alt text was never found. Fixed
in both main.py endpoints and _build_structure_tree.

commit.message:
Add Gen 2 evolution chains to evolutions page

Adds 14 new chains: pure Gen 2 lines (Sentret, Ledyba, Togepi, Natu,
Hoppip, Wooper, Snubbull, Slugma, Swinub, Phanpy, Larvitar), plus
cross-gen branches available in FireRed (Gloom→Bellossom, Scyther→Scizor,
Elekid→Electabuzz).

docs: create roadmap (9 phases, 26 requirements mapped)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add missing period markets to BetOnline, Novig, ProphetX scrapers

- BetOnline: Add MLB F7 innings fetch in HTTP-only mode (was only in
  Playwright mode) — adds h2h_f7, spreads_f7, totals_f7
- Novig: Add baseball period types (F5, F7, I1) to market type map so
  the GraphQL query requests them
- ProphetX: Add hockey periods (p1/p2/p3) and baseball periods
  (f5/f7/i1) to batch market_types request, plus fallback suffix
  detection from market_type field

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(attestation): implement get_validators_for_discipline + 5 gap tests

Gap 1 — Rust: add ValidatorTierPath link type to attestation_integrity;
publish_validator_profile now indexes profiles under "validators.{discipline_tag}"
paths; get_validators_for_discipline queries those paths (was a stub returning []).

Gap 2 — validator_workspace.test.ts: extend get_all_tasks test to receive
3 tasks and assert toHaveLength(3).

Gap 3 — governance.test.ts: add describe 7 — 1 Reproduced + 2 FailedToReproduce
(3 validators) → rate 1/3 → Divergent agreement level → FailedReproduction badge.

Gap 4 — researcher_repository.test.ts: add describe 6 — attempting to delete a
PreRegisteredProtocol via a nonexistent coordinator function is rejected, confirming
both API-level and validate()-level immutability protection.

Gap 5 — attestation.test.ts: add describe 16 — check_all_commitments_sealed direct
call returns false after 1st commit, true after 2nd (minimum_validators=2).

Also adds describe 15 (get_validators_for_discipline test) to attestation.test.ts.
Updates tests/README.md: 50→54 pass, 51→55 total; resolved-gaps table added.

All 55 tests pass (54 pass, 1 skipped — Gold badge, hardware-limited).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: git pull on workspace init — align local with remote before sync

Auto-sync engine now accepts initialPull option. When enabled, it checks
for configured remotes and pulls before starting the regular sync loop.
Errors are logged but don't block the sync loop from starting.
